description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-format-date` (T4-08) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-format-date/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, date/datetime typed (string or Date), format typed, locale typed, timezone typed
2. Accessibility — renders as `<time>` element with machine-readable `datetime` attribute, human-readable text for screen readers, relative time ("2 hours ago") announces correctly, axe-core pass
3. Tests — ISO date formatting, relative time, locale variants, timezone handling, invalid date, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — absolute dates, relative dates, locale switching, timezone demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens (minimal — this is text output), CSS parts (date)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, uses Intl.DateTimeFormat (no date library)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable (most date formatting done server-side, document the tradeoff)

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-format-date/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-format-date — T4-08 antagonistic quality review
